mapper.select: SELECT * FROM CARDS WHERE deleted_yn = 'N' ORDER BY created_at DESC
mapper.insert:
SELECT card_id FROM CARDS WHERE card_code = #{cardCode} FETCH FIRST 1 ROWS ONLY
INSERT INTO CARDS ( card_code, card_type, card_name, company_name, company_code, brand_name, annual_fee_domestic, annual_fee_overseas, previous_month_spend, minimum_age, maximum_age, credit_limit_min, credit_limit_max, target_user, summary_description, searchable_yn, visible_yn, approval_required_yn, card_status, publish_start_at, publish_end_at, application_count, created_by, created_at, deleted_yn ) VALUES ( #{cardCode}, #{cardType}, #{cardName}, #{companyName}, NVL(#{companyCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, '01'), #{brandName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{annualFeeDomestic}, #{annualFeeOverseas, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{previousMonthSpend, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{minimumAge, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{maximumAge, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{creditLimitMin, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{creditLimitMax, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{targetUser, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{summaryDescription, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, NVL(#{searchableYn, jdbcType=CHAR}, 'Y'), NVL(#{visibleYn, jdbcType=CHAR}, 'Y'), NVL(#{approvalRequiredYn, jdbcType=CHAR}, 'Y'), NVL(#{cardStatus, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, 'DRAFT'), #{publishStartAt, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{publishEndAt, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, 0, #{createdBy, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, SYSTIMESTAMP, 'N' )
mapper.update: UPDATE CARDS SET card_type = #{cardType}, card_name = #{cardName}, company_name = #{companyName}, brand_name = #{brandName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, annual_fee_domestic = #{annualFeeDomestic}, annual_fee_overseas = #{annualFeeOverseas, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, previous_month_spend= #{previousMonthSpend, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, minimum_age = #{minimumAge, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, maximum_age = #{maximumAge, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, credit_limit_min = #{creditLimitMin, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, credit_limit_max = #{creditLimitMax, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, target_user = #{targetUser, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, summary_description = #{summaryDescription, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, searchable_yn = #{searchableYn}, visible_yn = #{visibleYn}, updated_by = #{updateBy, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, updated_at = SYSTIMESTAMP WHERE card_id = #{cardId}
UPDATE CARDS SET card_status = 'STOPPED', deleted_yn = 'Y', deleted_at = SYSTIMESTAMP WHERE card_id = #{cardId}
UPDATE CARDS SET card_status = #{cardStatus}, updated_at = SYSTIMESTAMP WHERE card_id = #{cardId}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM CARDS WHERE publish_end_at < SYSTIMESTAMP AND card_status = 'PUBLISHED' AND deleted_yn = 'N'
mapper.update:
UPDATE CARDS SET card_status = 'EXPIRED', updated_at = SYSTIMESTAMP WHERE card_id IN
#{id}
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO CARD_IMAGES ( card_id, image_type, image_url, original_name, stored_name, file_size, mime_type, image_width, image_height, sort_order, created_at )
SELECT #{img.cardId}, #{img.imageType}, #{img.imageUrl}, #{img.originalName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{img.storedName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{img.fileSize, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{img.mimeType, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{img.imageWidth, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{img.imageHeight, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, NVL(#{img.sortOrder, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, 1), SYSTIMESTAMP FROM DUAL
